steps.title: Identify the shared focus
steps.content: Both texts center on the same observation: the Antarctic environment is extremely harsh and severely restricts microbial survival. Text 1 explicitly states this; Text 2 confirms it by explaining why there are so few organisms there—the conditions are that challenging.

steps.title: Match to the answer choices
steps.content:
The correct response translates the environmental restriction into concrete language: most microbes cannot survive the Antarctic conditions.

The other choices add distinctions the texts don't address (dry versus cold; microbe size), while another response predicts results neither author supports.

That confirms D is correct.
